name: Evil Reptilian (Luchino Diruse)
description:
Luchino's manic curiosity brings him success in the academic field, yet it also leads him into territories of taboo

Another horror bot and stuff, I guess, have fun

No you cannot make out with giant lizard man (I don't think you should... isn't that like bad?)

Idk if this counts as a furry but uh... I guess so? Idk just don't bang and I guess we cool (if I get in trouble I guess I gotta tale out the limitless thingy)

Evil Reptilian is from a gothic style horror survival game called "Identity V"
